results.title: ‘Open Minded’ Dating App Hookup At Target In Concord Leads To 3 Month Rape, Assault ...
results.description: CONCORD, NH — A multi-month investigation into a dating app hookup led to a man from Center Barnstead, now of Sandown, being charged with eight assault counts. On Aug. 3, 2025, an officer took a report of a past tense sexual assault that occurred at Target on D’Amante Drive a few days before. A woman in her early 20s said the incident involved a man she had conversations with on Feeld, a dating app “for the open-minded,” Fet, a sadomasochist app, and Snapchat, sometime between 8:30 and 10:30 p.m. on July 31, 2025, in his pickup truck. She knew the man only as “Jake,” and said the truck was a newer Dodge Ram 2500. Before the meetup, she had been communicating with Jake for several weeks. She claimed he deleted their Feeld conversations after the incident, while she had deleted him from her Snapchat connections. Their communications were stored on Fet, she said, and she provided the officer with information. Find out what's happening in Concordfor free with the latest updates from Patch. The woman said she agreed to meet the man for a “quickie” in a family bathroom at Target. However, before meeting him, she went into the store

results.title: AmperCap Acquisition Company Completes its $125,000,000 Initial Public Offering
results.description: NEW YORK, NY, June 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AmperCap Acquisition Company (the “Company”) announced today the closing of its initial public offering of 12,500,000 units. The offering was priced at $10.00 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of $125,000,000. Of the proceeds received from the consummation of the initial public offering and a simultaneous private placement of units, $126,250,000 was placed in a trust account of the Company.

results.title: LOLC Finance continues to strengthen regional presence
results.description: LOLC Finance PLC continues to strengthen its presence across Sri Lanka, reaffirming its commitment to improving financial accessibility and delivering innovative, customer-centric financial solutions to communities nationwide. Through its expanding branch network, the company remains focused on supporting individuals, entrepreneurs, and businesses while contributing to regional economic development.

results.title: JC Manalo announces candidacy for Cheyenne City Council Ward 1
results.description: CHEYENNE – JC Manalo, a longtime Cheyenne resident with extensive business and public service experience, on Thursday announced his candidacy for Cheyenne City Council, Ward 1.

results.title: Argentine Senate approves a judge Milei opposed over her ties to an investigative journalist
results.description: Argentina's Senate on Thursday approved the appointment of María Verónica Michelli as a judge of Federal Oral Court No. 3 in La Plata, a nomination President Javier Milei had tried to block because she is the sister-in-law of journalist Hugo Alconada Mon, of the newspaper LA NACION. The nomination was approved on the floor by 44 votes to 18 —all the negatives from the ruling party— with two abstentions, in a session that exposed a rift within the governing bloc.
